BizCor — Offline Activation System

Challenge-Response Demo — Internet ki zaroorat nahi

💻 Desktop EXE User ka PC
— abhi generate nahi hua —
Yeh code user tech support ko bhejta hai (WhatsApp / email se).
Seed andar chhupa hai — user nahi dekh sakta.
✅ Activation (EXE) Step 3
Seed: —  |  Machine: —
🛠 Tech Panel Tumhara Dashboard
— machine code daalo pehle —
Yeh code sirf usi machine ke liye valid hoga.
Dusri machine pe enter karo → invalid aayega.
📐 Algorithm (Simple)
MachineCode = SHA256( seed + machine_detail )[:16]
ActivationCode = SHA256( seed + machine_code )[:16]
Validation = SHA256( seed + own_machine_code ) === input
Poora flow — ek nazar mein
1EXE machine code banata hai (seed + hardware)
2User machine code tech ko bhejta hai
3Tech panel activation code generate karta hai
4User activation code EXE mein daalta hai
5EXE offline verify karta hai — ✅ Activated
